name: NPS Template
description: NPS Template - Marketing template for research professionals
instructions:
How to Use the NPS Template NPS Methodology Net Promoter Score measures customer loyalty on a 0-10 scale:
• Promoters (9-10): Loyal enthusiasts who drive growth
• Passives (7-8): Satisfied but not enthusiastic; vulnerable to competition
• Detractors (0-6): Unhappy customers who may damage your brand Response Log Enter customer feedback here. For each response:
1. Assign a unique Response ID
2. Record the date and customer details
3. Select NPS score (0-10) from dropdown
4. The Category column auto-calculates (Promoter/Passive/Detractor)
5. Capture verbatim feedback for analysis
6. Track follow
